nasb.text: “O Lord God, do not turn away the face of Your anointed; remember Your lovingkindness to Your servant David.”

esv.text: O Lord God, do not turn away the face of your anointed one! Remember your steadfast love for David your servant.”

cnv.text: 耶和華　神啊，求你不要轉臉不顧你所膏的人：願你記念你向你僕人大衛所施的慈愛。”

ccb.text: 耶和华上帝啊， 求你不要厌弃你所膏立的人， 顾念你曾应许以慈爱待你的仆人大卫。”
